title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE LOOC PRIMARY SCHOOL IN SITIO LOOC, BARANGAY TALOTO-AN, MUNICIPALITY OF CONCEPCION, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO DONATO VALDERAMA PRIMARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 21235 / 86 OG No. 7, 1292 (Feb. 12, 1990)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6818, December 18, 1989 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE LOOC PRIMARY SCHOOL IN SITIO LOOC, BARANGAY TALOTO-AN, MUNICIPALITY OF CONCEPCION, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO DONATO VALDERAMA PRIMARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Looc Primary School in Sitio Looc, Barangay Taloto-an, Municipality of Concepcion, Province of Iloilo, is hereby changed to Donato Valderama Primary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House

of

Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 30, 1989 and September 22, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of Representatives

Approved:Approved: December 18, 1989

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
